protocol.name: Morpho
protocol.tvl_note: Second-largest DeFi lending protocol behind Aave

fees.revenue_note: Morpho captures ZERO protocol revenue. All fees flow to LPs/lenders. Protocol earns from token incentives only.

valuation.note: P/F looks cheap but protocol captures ZERO fees. Revenue margin is 0%.

catalysts.apollo_deal: Apollo Global ($938B AUM) signed agreement to acquire up to 90M MORPHO tokens (9% supply) over 48 months
catalysts.eth_foundation: Ethereum Foundation deployed 3,400 ETH (~$7M) into Morpho Vaults (March 18, 2026)
catalysts.morpho_v2: V2 roadmap: fixed-rate, fixed-term loans for institutional users
catalysts.base_growth: Crossed $1B active loans on Base network (Jan 2026)
